EmailTemplate.name: Cancellation Survey
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation Survey
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Cancellation_Survey__c.Applicant_Name__c},
Please click the below link and give your feedback.
Link: https://runwal.my.salesforce-sites.com/cs/CancellationSurvey?id={!Cancellation_Survey__c.Id}
Regards, Runwal Group
